name: ELOXX PHARMACEUT.  DL-,01
summary: Eloxx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing novel RNA-modulating drug candidates that restore protein production in patients with rare and ultra-rare premature termination codon diseases. They are focused on developing therapies for cystic fibrosis and other genetic disorders. The company is headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts.
